title: Quick check, Nexus and the admin view

questions.prompt: An admin needs to find the account for ablemoose.example. Which app do they open?
questions.explanation: Nexus is the per-account management app. Dashboard is platform-wide health; Job Runner is the background-task queue; App Index is the search catalogue.

questions.prompt: Every row in the Nexus account list corresponds to exactly one customer-registered domain on the server.
questions.explanation: Each Nexus row is an account, identified by its primary domain. A single account can host many addon domains (and subdomains) under the same login; those don't get their own Nexus rows.
